subtitle: Coverage-aware race intelligence dashboard

source_inferred_pre_capture_gap_seconds.note: Derived from LiveRC leader elapsed time at first captured snapshot.

operator_reported_approx_gap_seconds.note: User-provided context: missed about the first 20 minutes.

estimated_race_start_utc.note: Capture start minus source-inferred leader elapsed at first snapshot.

captured_wall_clock_seconds.note: Observed duration between first and final captured snapshots.

official_race_clock_at_final_snapshot_se.note: Leader elapsed time in final captured snapshot.

share_of_official_race_clock_observed.note: Approximate observed share of the race clock.

share_of_official_race_clock_unobserved_.note: Approximate unobserved opening share of the race clock.

first_captured_leader.note: Leader at first captured snapshot, not necessarily first leader of the race.

first_captured_leader_lap.note: Leader lap at first captured snapshot.

top_battles.why_it_matters: multiple pair lead changes; comeback signal; final-order relevance
top_battles.battle_card_narrative: Team Bulgaria finished ahead of Oakwood Blue by 4 laps. The pair lead changed 14 times, with 2:35:16 spent within three laps. The result includes a comeback signal: Team Bulgaria overcame an observed deficit of up to 16 laps. The last decisive pair pass was at race clock 5:25:24.

top_battles.why_it_matters: multiple pair lead changes; comeback signal; final-order relevance
top_battles.battle_card_narrative: ISŠA Brno finished ahead of Team Bulgaria by 20 laps. The pair lead changed 17 times, with 2:45:45 spent within three laps. The result includes a comeback signal: ISŠA Brno overcame an observed deficit of up to 14 laps. The last decisive pair pass was at race clock 4:07:50.

known_incidents.reported_note: Ostrov Team had a transponder issue that was fixed early on.
known_incidents.analytics_resolution: Treat early Ostrov zero laps, lap reset, catch-up jump and immediate correction as confirmed timing/transponder artefacts, not pace, pit or suspicious driving behaviour.
known_incidents.downstream_rule: Keep official source-state records, but exclude affected rows from pace, delay, position-volatility and race-story movement analytics. Keep the later 15:24:52 lap jump unresolved unless additional race context confirms it belongs to the same issue.

notes: The first ~20 minutes were not captured. The first snapshot is treated as a baseline, not the race start.
Final standings use cumulative LiveRC values. Pace, delay and battle analytics use validated captured-segment data.
The early Ostrov Team transponder issue is treated as a known timing artefact and excluded from performance inference.
